title: Kids Pack
description: Silly stories for chaotic little gremlins.

stories.title: Zoo Trip
stories.template: During our trip to the zoo, a {color1} {animal1} escaped its enclosure and started {verbIng1} directly beside the {noun1} while eating enormous amounts of {food1}.

stories.title: School Picture Day
stories.template: On school picture day, I showed up with a very {adjective1} {hairStyle1} and immediately felt {emotion1} after someone said I looked like a surprised {animal1}.

stories.title: Birthday Cake Disaster
stories.template: For my {number1}th birthday, we ordered a giant {food1} cake shaped like a {animal1}, but before anyone could eat it, my cousin accidentally {verbPast1} directly into the {noun1}.

stories.title: Sleepover Night
stories.template: {friend1} came over for a sleepover, but nobody slept because we kept hearing {sound1} noises coming from the kitchen. Eventually we discovered a mysterious {object1} surrounded by {pluralNoun1} that appeared to be slowly {verbIng1}. We were deeply {emotion1} but also kind of impressed.

stories.title: Superhero Kid
stories.template: By day I am a normal kid, but by night I become The {adjective1} {food1}. Using the power of my mighty {bodyPart1}, I protect innocent {pluralNoun1} from villains who want to {verb1} everything.

stories.title: Classroom Chaos
stories.template: Everything was normal in {teacher1}'s {schoolSubject1} class until somebody accidentally brought a live {animal1} to school. The animal immediately {verbPast1} across the classroom, knocked over somebody's {food1}, and caused the entire class to become extremely {emotion1}.

stories.title: Camping Trip
stories.template: Our camping trip to {location1} started off very {adjective1}. We made {food1} over the fire and spent the evening {verbIng1} under the stars. Unfortunately, a group of wild {animalPlural1} appeared during the night and stole our {object1}. Everyone became extremely {emotion1}, especially my dad, who claimed the animals were "working together strategically."

stories.title: School Field Trip
stories.template:
Our school field trip to {place1} started off completely normal. {teacher1} told everyone to stay together, avoid touching anything weird, and absolutely not throw {food1} at the exhibits. Naturally, this lasted about six minutes.

Things became strange when a very loud {animal1} escaped from somewhere nearby and started aggressively {verbIng1} beside a giant {object1}. Half the class screamed, three kids started laughing uncontrollably, and one parent volunteer immediately became extremely {emotion1}.

Meanwhile, {friend1} somehow wandered into a restricted area filled with mysterious {pluralNoun1}. Nobody noticed until an announcement came over the speakers describing "a small child wearing a {color1} shirt and carrying a suspicious {noun1}." At this point, the teachers looked completely exhausted.

The trip finally ended after somebody accidentally pressed a button they definitely should not have touched, causing alarms to go off and forcing everyone to leave in a hurry. On the ride home, the entire class sat silently on the {vehicle1} while pretending none of this had happened.
